note: Default outcome library — the initial seed for the globally-editable DefaultOutcome table. Editing the global library (Settings > Outcomes) changes the template for NEW engagements only; existing engagements keep their own copy. outcome keys are stable identifiers referenced by coverage.json. Security outcomes are split to the granularity at which Microsoft SKUs and third-party tools actually differ: Endpoint = EPP vs EDR; Email = Hygiene vs Advanced Threat Protection; Identity is split three ways — SSO/IdP (directory + single sign-on, on any tenant) vs MFA & Conditional Access (Entra P1: dynamic/adaptive auth) vs Governance (Entra P2: PIM/access reviews); plus CASB and the two telephony layers (PBX vs PSTN). Collaboration is Team Chat & Meetings (Teams vs Slack/Zoom); desktop apps and cloud storage are their own outcomes.

outcomes.name: Endpoint Protection (EPP)
outcomes.description: Anti-malware, next-gen antivirus, and attack surface reduction on endpoints.

outcomes.name: Endpoint Detection & Response (EDR)
outcomes.description: Behavioral threat detection, investigation, and automated response on endpoints.

outcomes.name: Email Hygiene / Anti-Spam
outcomes.description: Baseline spam, malware, and connection filtering for email.

outcomes.name: Advanced Email Threat Protection
outcomes.description: Safe links, safe attachments, and anti-phishing / impersonation protection.

outcomes.name: Mobile Device & App Management (MDM/MAM)
outcomes.description: Device enrollment, configuration, compliance, and mobile application management.

outcomes.name: Identity Provider & SSO
outcomes.description: Cloud identity provider / directory and single sign-on (SSO) — the IdP that federates application access (e.g. Entra ID / Azure AD). Present on any Microsoft cloud suite; displaces a standalone IdP directory (Okta, Ping).

outcomes.name: MFA & Conditional Access
outcomes.description: Multi-factor authentication with Conditional Access — dynamic, risk/context-based access policies (Entra ID P1 or higher). Stronger than the basic security-defaults MFA included with any tenant.

outcomes.name: Identity Governance & Privileged Access
outcomes.description: Privileged Identity Management, Identity Protection, access reviews, and entitlement management.

outcomes.name: Information Protection & Compliance
outcomes.description: Data classification, sensitivity labeling, and data loss prevention (DLP).

outcomes.name: Endpoint Drive Encryption
outcomes.description: Full-disk encryption management (e.g. BitLocker/FileVault) across endpoints.

outcomes.name: Security Awareness / Phishing Simulation
outcomes.description: User security training and simulated phishing campaigns.

outcomes.name: Cloud App Security / SaaS Visibility (CASB)
outcomes.description: Shadow-IT discovery, SaaS session control, and OAuth app governance.

outcomes.name: Team Chat & Meetings
outcomes.description: Team messaging / channels and online meetings — the collaboration hub (Microsoft Teams vs. Slack, Zoom, Google Meet). Desktop apps and cloud storage are separate outcomes.

outcomes.name: Cloud PBX / Call Control
outcomes.description: Cloud phone system (Teams Phone / Phone System): call control, auto-attendant, call queues — the PBX layer, independent of PSTN dial-tone.

outcomes.name: PSTN Dial-Tone
outcomes.description: Outbound/inbound PSTN calling (Calling Plan, Operator Connect, or Direct Routing) — the dial-tone layer that rides on the Cloud PBX.

outcomes.name: Security Information & Event Management (SIEM)
outcomes.description: Log aggregation, correlation, detection, and automated response (SOAR).

outcomes.name: Analytics & Business Intelligence
outcomes.description: Self-service BI, dashboards, and enterprise reporting.

outcomes.name: Process Automation / Workflow Automation
outcomes.description: Low-code workflow automation, approvals, and robotic process automation.

outcomes.name: Threat Exposure & Vulnerability Management
outcomes.description: Continuous vulnerability assessment, exposure scoring, and remediation guidance.

outcomes.name: Information Governance / eDiscovery / Records Management
outcomes.description: Retention, legal hold, content search, eDiscovery, and records management.

outcomes.name: Desktop Software
outcomes.description: The installed desktop Office apps (Word, Excel, PowerPoint, Outlook, etc.) — distinguishes mainline bundles from web/mobile-only Frontline bundles.

outcomes.name: Full-Size Cloud Storage
outcomes.description: Full per-user cloud storage / large mailbox (e.g. 1TB+ OneDrive, 50GB+ mailbox) — distinguishes mainline bundles from the limited storage in Frontline bundles.
